# Neutron

Neutron is a full-stack framework ecosystem. One mental model across web, mobile, desktop, and AI — backed by Nucleus, a multi-model database engine built in Rust.

## Projects

### rs/ — Neutron Rust (Web Framework)
High-performance HTTP/1.1, HTTP/2, HTTP/3 web framework in Rust. Hyper-based, tokio async, middleware pipeline, file-based routing, WebSockets, SSE, multipart, TLS, gRPC, GraphQL.
- Entry: `rs/crates/neutron/src/lib.rs`
- Tests: `cargo test` in `rs/`
- Key types: `App`, `Router`, `Request`, `Response`, `Middleware`, `Handler`

### ts/ — Neutron TypeScript (UI Framework)
SSR-first TypeScript framework with Preact components, file-based routing, signals, server actions, streaming. Think SvelteKit but Preact.
- Entry: `ts/packages/neutron/src/`
- Tests: `pnpm test` in `ts/`
- Key APIs: `defineRoute`, `useSignal`, `cache()`, `revalidateTag()`, `ServerIsland`

### mojo/ — Neutron Mojo (ML Library)
Tensor operations, quantization (Q8/Q4/NF4/FP8), inference pipeline, training stack in Mojo. Runs on CPU with SIMD kernels.
- Entry: `mojo/neutron-mojo/src/`
- Tests: `pixi run mojo build -I src test/test_*.mojo`
- Key types: `Tensor`, `Model`, `QuantizedModel`, `pipeline_generate`

### nucleus/ — Nucleus Database Engine
Multi-model database in Rust. One engine for SQL, Key-Value, Vector, Graph, Timeseries, Document, Full-Text Search, Geo, and Pub/Sub. PostgreSQL wire protocol compatible.
- Entry: `nucleus/src/`
- Tests: `cargo test --lib` in `nucleus/`
- Key SQL functions: `kv_get/set`, `ts_insert/range`, `doc_insert/query`, `columnar_insert`
- Port: 5432 (pgwire)

### studio/ — Nucleus Studio
Visual database management GUI. Browse all 9 data models (SQL, KV, Vector, Timeseries, Document etc.) in one UI with toggles. Schema designer + code generator + database browser.
- Stack: Neutron TypeScript + Preact + Nucleus (dogfooding)

### go/ — Neutron Go (SDK)
Go language SDK — Nucleus client and Neutron server bindings for Go backends.

### zig/ — Neutron Zig (Embedded Client)
Nucleus client for embedded/IoT systems. 12KB binary, zero heap allocations, comptime SQL validation. Targets ARM, RISC-V, AVR, ESP32.

### python/ — Neutron Python
Python support via Mojo's Python interop. Call NumPy, pandas, PyTorch from Mojo. Nucleus Python client planned.

### native/ — Neutron Native (Mobile Framework)
Preact components rendering to native iOS/Android views via React Native bridge. Write once, render native.

### mobile-preview/ — Neutron Mobile Preview
On-device preview app for Neutron Native (Expo Go equivalent). Written in Go, compiles to iOS + Android. Scan QR code to preview native apps instantly.

### desktop/ — Neutron Desktop
Cross-platform desktop apps using Tauri 2.0 + Preact + Neutron Rust backend. ~10MB bundles vs Electron's 100MB+.

## Nucleus ORM — Per Language

Each language has an idiomatic ORM for Nucleus covering all 9 data models:

- **TypeScript**: Drizzle-style — schema defined in code, no codegen, fully typed
- **Rust**: Proc macros — `nucleus::schema!{}`, compile-time checked
- **Zig**: Comptime — zero overhead, SQL validated at compile time
- **Python**: Pydantic-style class definitions
- **Go**: Struct tags (idiomatic Go)

Single schema covers SQL tables, KV stores, vector collections, timeseries metrics, and document collections — unlike Drizzle/Prisma which only cover SQL.

## Key Design Decisions

- Neutron TS uses Preact (3KB) not React (42KB)
- Nucleus uses PostgreSQL wire protocol (pgwire) — works with any Postgres client
- Nucleus MVCC + WAL crash recovery — production-grade persistence
- Neutron Rust uses hyper 1.x + tokio, no framework overhead
- Mojo uses SIMD kernels for tensor ops (337x vs scalar dot product)
- All projects are MIT licensed

## File Conventions

- `rs/crates/neutron/src/app.rs` — main App builder
- `rs/crates/neutron/src/handler.rs` — Request/Response types
- `rs/crates/neutron/src/router.rs` — routing
- `nucleus/src/` — all database engine modules
- `ts/packages/neutron/src/` — TypeScript framework source
- `mojo/neutron-mojo/src/` — Mojo tensor library source
